_meta.name: Phoenix Omega — FLUX txt2img Manga (brand-2 V1 schnell path: schnell-fp8 / 4 / 1.0 / euler / simple, webtoon vertical)
_meta.description: EmptyLatent + KSampler denoise 1.0. Generator replaces {{positive_prompt}} / {{negative_prompt}}. Uses flux1-schnell-fp8 (4-step distilled) at steps=4 cfg=1.0 with euler/simple — schnell is incompatible with steps>=8 and cfg>1 and produces silently degraded outputs in those configs. Default dims 1080x1920 = WEBTOON vertical panel. This is the brand-2 V1 ship path; brand-1 (the_alarm_is_lying et al) uses H1=A via flux_txt2img_manga.json.
_meta.preserved_from: Old flux_txt2img_manga.json schnell config (pre-2026-06-02). Kept for brand-2 V1 ship which is operator-approved on schnell per skills/pearl-int/references/manga_render_path_decision.md.

inputs.text: {{negative_prompt}}, text, words, letters, captions, watermark, signature, signs, writing, typography, text characters, font, lettering, logos, subtitles, calligraphy
